sentence: 客厅墙上挂着几幅书画。
pinyin: Kètīng qiáng shàng guàzhe jǐ fú shūhuà.
english: Several pieces of calligraphy and painting hang on the living room wall.

sentence: 他升职后职级提高了一级。
pinyin: Tā shēngzhí hòu zhíjí tígāole yī jí.
english: After his promotion, his job grade went up one level.

sentence: 这家小店只收现款，不能刷卡。
pinyin: Zhè jiā xiǎo diàn zhǐ shōu xiànkuǎn, bù néng shuā kǎ.
english: This small shop only accepts cash — no card payments.

meaning: to expire; to run out; to come to an end
sentence: 合同期满后，他选择不续签了。
pinyin: Hétong qīmǎn hòu, tā xuǎnzé bù xù qiān le.
english: After the contract expired, he chose not to renew it.

sentence: 农业集体化改变了农村的生产方式。
pinyin: Nóngyè jítǐhuà gǎibiànle nóngcūn de shēngchǎn fāngshì.
english: Agricultural collectivization changed the way production was organized in rural areas.
